name: Boreal Agent Protocol Adapter Samples
description: Concrete target-only MCP, A2A, and x402 sample payloads showing how familiar agent protocols map onto Boreal Request-native contracts without becoming canonical roots or live adapter authorization.

proposal.summary: I can complete the requested automation cleanup and submit proof artifacts.

terms.deliverableSummary: Working automation fix plus evidence artifact and handoff notes.

borealOperation.policyGate: request-detail agentActionPolicy.apply_to_request must allow the represented actor.

promotionRules: MCP tool success is not completion proof.
The governed HTTP route creates the Commitment and RequestEvent truth.
The Idempotency-Key must be preserved across retries.

parts.text: Submit proof for the accepted fulfillment lane.

artifact.name: sandbox-proof.txt
artifact.summary: Reviewable proof for the sandbox request.

borealOperation.policyGate: Accepted Commitment or direct-owner Fulfillment authorization must exist before Artifact proof is published.

promotionRules: A2A taskId is an adapter correlation id, not a Request id.
A2A Artifact becomes Boreal Artifact truth only through the governed artifact route.
Owner review is still required before completed-state claims.

borealOperation.policyGate: Endpoint must be explicitly marked x402-capable and successful payment verification must reconcile into Transaction truth.

promotionRules: x402 payload is payment metadata, not completion proof.
Settlement must reconcile into Transaction before paid execution is claimed.
The completed public source Request must not be mutated by the private run.

rules: Protocol adapter samples are shape guidance only.
Live adapters must enforce the same HTTP auth, scopes, idempotency, policy, payment, and completion gates.
Adapter ids stay correlation ids below Boreal Request truth.
Do not claim MCP, A2A, or x402 support is live until a live route contract says so.
